title: Complete C++ course
description: Practical course on programming using C++ based on the syllabus followed at Engineering colleges in India

modules.name: Introduction to C++
modules.description: Introduction to C++ and its basics - datatypes, operators

submodules.name: Variables and data types in C++
Operators: Arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, conditional
Unary, type conversion and type casting
Basic programs of C++ using operators

problems.name: Find the Area of any rectangle

modules.name: Conditional statements and Loops
modules.description: Control Structures: decision making and looping statements

submodules.name: Decision Control - if, if - else, if-else-if programs
Program based on nested for loop

problems.name: Test cases with multiple lines of input

modules.name: Arrays, Strings & introduction to sorting
modules.description: Basics of Arrays, strings, pointers, functions and sorting

submodules.name: Call by value and call by reference
Array: Declaration, initialisation and its problems

problems.name: Index & printing specific elements of an Array
Changing the elements of an Array

submodules.name: Insertion, deletion in 1d array, merge two arrays

modules.name: Structures, Pointers and File handling
modules.description: Slightly advanced concepts of Structures, pointers and file handling using C++

problems.name: What is a structure used for

submodules.name: Array of structure and nested structure
Pointer to pointer, Array of pointer
File handling - File opening modes, file handling functions

problems.name: Read the file and output to console
Read the file and output to another file
Read, do operations and output to another file
Programs related to file handling - Append
